question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, … , 𝑋𝑛 be a random sample of size 𝑛⁡(≥2) from a population having probability density function 𝑓(𝑥; 𝜃) = 𝜃(2𝑥)𝜃−1⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡if⁡⁡0 < 𝑥≤1 𝜃(2 −2𝑥)𝜃−1⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡if⁡ 1 2 < 𝑥≤1 ⁡⁡0⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡otherwise,⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡⁡ where 𝜃> 0 is an unknown parameter. Then which one of the following is a maximum likelihood estimator of 𝜃?
